attachment.preposition_host: object of preposition (بِكَ = with you, لَهُم = for them)
attachment.verb_host: subject (nا الفاعلين = we) or object (هم/كم = them/you) -> NOT possessive

forbidden: treat verb-subject نا as possessive our
purpose: Decide what an attached pronoun (enclitic) IS by the host POS + syntax.
